tldr: Replace Airship with CleverTap by re-instrumenting mobile SDKs, importing user profiles and events, and rebuilding segments, journeys, and templates.
why_switch: Built-in analytics and segmentation alongside messaging
Strong mobile retention features (RFM, cohorts) under one roof
Multi-channel: push, in-app, SMS, email, web in a single suite
Consolidate analytics + engagement to reduce tooling sprawl
what_to_export: iOS/Android device tokens and platform metadata
Custom event definitions and recent event history
export_method: Pull users, devices, tags, and events from Airship using its data export and reporting paths; consult Airship's official documentation for the current supported methods and quotas. Save outputs as CSV/JSON. Document campaign and journey logic from the Airship dashboard since structural exports are typically limited.
import_method: Integrate the CleverTap SDKs in iOS and Android per CleverTap's official integration docs, mapping your external IDs to CleverTap Identity. Backfill historical user profiles and events using CleverTap's server-side APIs as documented. Recreate segments, journeys, push templates, and in-app campaigns in the CleverTap dashboard.

concept_mapping.note: Use the same stable ID to preserve cross-device identity
Booleans modeled as properties; rebuild segments from rules
Re-emit from client and/or backfill via API

gotchas: Device tokens are not portable — collected fresh by the CleverTap SDK
Identity merges can produce duplicate profiles if external IDs aren't consistent
Historical event backfill has volume and time-window limits — check CleverTap docs
Journeys rarely port 1:1; budget time for QA and parity testing
Pricing tiers scale with MAUs and channels — validate cost model early
Consent/opt-in state must be explicitly migrated and re-verified

email.subject: Airship → CleverTap migration plan
email.body:
Hi team,

Proposing we migrate mobile messaging from Airship to CleverTap. CleverTap consolidates analytics, segmentation, and multi-channel messaging, which should reduce tool sprawl.

Approach:
1) Export users, devices, tags, and events from Airship.
2) Add the CleverTap SDKs to iOS and Android with our existing external IDs.
3) Backfill profiles and events via CleverTap's server APIs.
4) Rebuild segments, journeys, push, and in-app templates.
5) Dual-run for a release cycle, then cut over.

Estimated effort: 3-8 weeks depending on journey complexity. Detailed checklist (identity, consent, segment parity, cost modeling) to follow.

Thanks
